scripts.cf:build: npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npm run cf:prepare
scripts.cf:preview: npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npm run cf:prepare && npx wrangler pages dev
scripts.cf:deploy: npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npm run cf:prepare && npx wrangler pages deploy
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply krote-run-db --local --persist-to %USERPROFILE%/.wrangler/states/krote-run
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply krote-run-db --remote
scripts.db:series:local: npm run db:series:generate && npx wrangler d1 execute krote-run-db --local --file=./migrations/seed-series.sql --persist-to %USERPROFILE%/.wrangler/states/krote-run
scripts.db:series:remote: npm run db:series:generate && npx wrangler d1 execute krote-run-db --remote --file=./migrations/seed-series.sql
